response.script: Ji sir/mam, hum exchange offer provide karte hain. Aap apne purane furniture ke badle mein naya furniture purchase kar sakte hain. Is offer mein aapko 25% + 25% discount milega. Pehle naye furniture ke MRP par 25% discount, phir final bill calculation ke baad remaining amount par additional 25% discount.
response.breakdown_explanation: For example, agar furniture ka MRP 1 lakh hai, toh pehle 25% discount se 75,000 hoga. Uske baad 75,000 par aur 25% discount se final price approximately 56,250 hoga.
